# Danny Cen — full digest for AI retrieval

Site: https://dannydev.space
Languages: Spanish (default, es-MX) and English (en-US under /en/)
Contact preference: use https://dannydev.space/contact/ (book a call or leave name/phone/message) or share https://dannydev.space/meets/ for direct scheduling. Danny initiates follow-up.

## Who

Danny Cen is a Software Engineer based in Mérida, Yucatán, Mexico.
Focus: AI automation, RevOps, data analysis, and reducing friction between people and ERP/CRM/systems.
Certified Kommo CRM implementer. Experience as Product Owner / Project Manager.
Available for freelance, remote, or hybrid projects.

Tagline (ES): Creo soluciones y optimizo procesos para que tu ERP, CRM o sistema deje de dar dolores de cabeza.
Tagline (EN): I build solutions and optimize processes so your ERP, CRM, or internal tools stop being a headache.

## Services

1. AI automation — agents, chatbots, flows connecting WhatsApp, CRM, APIs, and business tools.
2. RevOps & CRM — Kommo, Odoo, pipeline alignment across marketing/sales/ops.
3. Less friction in ERP & systems — process design around existing tools.
4. Data analysis — reports, dashboards, actionable signals.

## Career (most recent first)

- Applications Administrator / PM — Grupo ALI (Jul 2023 — Present, on-site). Real-estate digital transformation: Kommo, WhatsApp Cloud API bots, n8n/Make, servers, BigQuery.
- AI Automation Developer — Fiborti Analytics (Aug 2025 — Jul 2026, remote freelance). Automation, AI, CRM ecosystems for sales teams.
- QA Frontend / QA Analyst — 31ROOMS (Sep 2024 — Jan 2025, remote). UNADM project: Playwright, UI/UX validation.
- Front-end developer — Idea2Form · Idris Aguero (Aug 2020 — Jan 2024, remote). Implemented mission-driven sites from Figma wireframes (EPACA, Self-eSTEM, Decolonizing Wealth, Equity Is Dynamic, and more).

## Portfolio case studies

Live sites were coded from Idea2Form / Idris Aguero Figma designs; Danny’s role was front-end implementation with craft and fidelity.

- East Palo Alto Community Archive — https://dannydev.space/portafolio/epa-community-archive/ — https://epacommunityarchive.org/
- Idea2Form — https://dannydev.space/portafolio/idea2form/ — https://idea2form.com/
- Self-eSTEM — https://dannydev.space/portafolio/self-estem/ — https://selfestem.org/
- Decolonizing Wealth Project — https://dannydev.space/portafolio/decolonizing-wealth/ — https://www.decolonizingwealth.com/
- Equity Is Dynamic — https://dannydev.space/portafolio/equity-is-dynamic/ — https://www.equityisdynamic.com/

## Stack (selected)

AI/automation: AI agents, OpenAI / Claude / Gemini, n8n / Make / Zapier, WhatsApp Cloud API
Development: JavaScript, PHP, Angular, Ruby on Rails, WordPress, MySQL, Docker
Systems/CRM: Kommo CRM (Certified Implementer), Odoo, RevOps, AWS, Linux, GCP
Data/ops: dashboards, reporting, process optimization, ERP/CRM integrations
AI tooling: Cursor, Claude Code, Warp AI
